source_pr.title: session: test that temporary tables will also be retried
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Close https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/24560

Problem Summary:
Even if data of global temporary tables are only visible to the current transaction, DML on it needs to be retried because DML on normal tables may rely on the data of global temporary tables. 

E.g.
```sql
INSERT INTO normal_table SELECT * FROM temp_table;
UPDATE normal_table, temp_table SET normal_table.b=temp_table.b WHERE normal_table.a=temp_table.a;
```

### What is changed and how it works?

What's Changed: Add some test cases.

### Related changes

- N/A

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test

Side effects

- N/A

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- No release notes.
